mapper.select:
SELECT m.member_id, m.login_id, m.enabled, m.created_at, m.update_at, m.last_login, h.nickname, h.name, h.email, h.phone, h.content, h.PROFILE_IMAGE_URL as profile_photo FROM member m LEFT OUTER JOIN host_detail h ON m.member_id = h.member_id JOIN memberAuthority ma ON m.login_id = ma.login_id
AND UPPER(ma.authority) = 'HOST'
AND
AND m.enabled = #{enabled}
ORDER BY m.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member m LEFT OUTER JOIN host_detail h ON m.member_id = h.member_id JOIN memberAuthority ma ON m.login_id = ma.login_id
AND UPPER(ma.authority) = 'HOST'
AND
AND m.enabled = #{enabled}

SELECT m.member_id, m.login_id, password, enabled, created_at, update_at, last_login, failure_cnt, name, email, phone, PROFILE_IMAGE_URL as profile_photo, nickname, content FROM member m LEFT OUTER JOIN host_detail h ON m.member_id = h.member_id WHERE m.member_id = #{member_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET failure_cnt = 0 WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
UPDATE member SET enabled = #{enabled} WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_status(num, member_id, status_code, memo, register_id, reg_date) VALUES (seq_member_status.NEXTVAL, #{member_id}, #{status_code}, #{memo}, #{register_id}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT num, ms.member_id, status_code, memo, register_id, a.name as registerName, reg_date FROM member_status ms LEFT OUTER JOIN admin_detail a ON ms.register_id = a.member_id WHERE ms.member_id = #{member_id} ORDER BY num DESC

SELECT num, ms.member_id, status_code, memo, register_id, a.name as registerName, reg_date FROM member_status ms LEFT OUTER JOIN admin_detail a ON ms.register_id = a.member_id WHERE ms.member_id = #{member_id} ORDER BY num DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
